images.description:
TEXT: Tiggo 7 Pro
COLORS: Red, black, silver, blue
CATEGORY: FULL VEHICLE
TYPE: SUV
BRAND: Chery
DETAILS: The image shows a red Chery Tiggo 7 Pro SUV set against a cityscape backdrop with palm trees. The vehicle has a sleek, modern design with a prominent front grille, stylish headlights, and a dynamic side profile. The contrasting black and silver accents on the bodywork add to the overall premium appearance. The vehicle appears to be positioned on a road or driveway, suggesting an urban or suburban setting.

TEXT: None visible
COLORS: Silver, black
CATEGORY: FULL VEHICLE
TYPE: SUV
BRAND: Hyundai
DETAILS: This image shows a silver Hyundai SUV model. The vehicle has a distinctive front grille design with a prominent Hyundai logo. The overall design appears modern and sleek, with sharp angles and a muscular stance. The SUV is set against a dark background, emphasizing its striking appearance.

TEXT: None visible
COLORS: Gray, black
CATEGORY: FULL VEHICLE
TYPE: SUV
BRAND: Hyundai
DETAILS: The image shows a mid-size SUV from the Hyundai brand. The vehicle features a sleek, angular design with a prominent grille and swept-back headlights. The body has a distinctive sculpted look with sharp creases and lines. The SUV appears to have a large, upright profile with a spacious interior. The overall design conveys a sense of power and modern styling.

TEXT: none visible
COLORS: black, gray
CATEGORY: FULL VEHICLE
TYPE: SUV
BRAND: Hyundai
DETAILS: The image shows a large SUV with a distinctive front grille design and sleek, angular styling. The vehicle appears to be the Hyundai Santa Fe model, with a bold, muscular presence and prominent Hyundai branding on the front. The overall design conveys a premium, high-end aesthetic.

TEXT: none visible
COLORS: Red, black
CATEGORY: FULL VEHICLE
TYPE: SUV
BRAND: Hyundai
DETAILS: The image shows a red Hyundai SUV in a front-angled view. The vehicle has a bold, angular design with a large front grille and sleek headlights. It appears to be a mid-size or large SUV model from the Hyundai brand. The image provides a clear, detailed view of the entire vehicle.

TEXT: none
COLORS: White, silver, black
CATEGORY: FULL VEHICLE
TYPE: SUV
BRAND: Hyundai
DETAILS: The image shows a new Hyundai SUV model with a sleek, modern design. The front grille features a prominent Hyundai logo, and the overall body shape is aerodynamic and stylish. The vehicle appears to have large alloy wheels and a panoramic sunroof. The overall impression is of a premium and technologically advanced SUV.

TEXT: None visible
COLORS: White, silver, black
CATEGORY: FULL VEHICLE
TYPE: SUV
BRAND: Genesis
DETAILS: This image shows a full view of a Genesis SUV. The vehicle has a sleek, modern design with a prominent grille and distinctive headlight and taillight shapes. The overall body shape and design elements suggest this is a mid-size or larger SUV model from the Genesis brand.

TEXT: Tougo 7 Intelligent
COLORS: Grey, black, silver
CATEGORY: FULL VEHICLE
TYPE: SUV
BRAND: Changan (Tougo 7 is a model of Changan)
DETAILS: The image shows a modern, sleek-looking SUV with a prominent front grille design featuring a honeycomb pattern. The vehicle has sharp, angular lines and a sporty stance. There are large, stylized headlights and a raked windshield. The overall styling suggests a premium, high-tech SUV.

TEXT: None visible
COLORS: Black, silver, blue
CATEGORY: VEHICLE PART
TYPE: Dashboard, interior
BRAND: Lucid
DETAILS: The image shows the interior dashboard of a Lucid electric vehicle. The dashboard features a large digital display screen in the center, with various controls and buttons surrounding it. The steering wheel, gear shifter, and various other interior components are visible, all in a sleek, modern design.
